parsed_output.justification: The only role that shows a clear nighttime action leading to a werewolf ending position is the copycat (doppelganger) who looked at a center card and took on that role.  In the transcript the copycat is addressed by the line “James: Who’s looking at the center cards?” indicating James is the one who examined a center card.  Since Tyler is the only character identified as a seer (he reports seeing two center cards and spotting a werewolf), it is highly likely that the copycat’s card was a werewolf, making him a werewolf by the end of the night.  Therefore James is the most probable werewolf.
